ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plate belongs to */,
  "plate_map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate map used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the plate was used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plate */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the plate */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the plate was last updated */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied the plate */,
  "lot_number" TEXT /* Lot number of the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plates_plate_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_map_id") REFERENCES plate_maps ("plate_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plates_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate the well belongs to */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the well */,
  "clone_number" TEXT /* Clone number of the cells in the well */,
  "celltype_shorthand" TEXT /* Shorthand for the cell type */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied to the well */,
  "treatment_shorthand" TEXT /* Shorthand for the treatment */,
  "treatment_time" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "cell_density" TEXT /* Cell density in the well */,
  "time_to_adhere" TEXT /* Time required for cells to adhere */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the well */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the well */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the well was last updated */,
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medium used in the well */,
  "medium_volume" REAL /* Volume of the medium used in the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_clone_number FOREIGN KEY ("clone_number") REFERENCES clones ("clone_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the concentration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the treatment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the treatment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was last updated */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound used in the treatment */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "shorthand" TEXT /* Shorthand for the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cell type */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the cell type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the cell type was last updated */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line the cell type belongs to */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the cell type belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_types_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_types_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clones" (
  "clone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clone */,
  "clone_number" TEXT /* Clone number of the cells */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type the clone belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clone */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the clone */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the clone */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the clone was last updated */,
  "parent_clone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent clone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plate_maps" (
  "plate_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate map */,
  "plate_map_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate map */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the plate map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plate map */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the plate map */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the plate map */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the plate map was last updated */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who supplied the plate map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plate_maps_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plate_maps_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plate_maps_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the data belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., cell count, viability) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data point */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data point */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was last updated */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., treatment, cell density) */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the condition */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the condition */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was last updated */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the protocol */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the protocol */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the department */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the department */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vendor */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the vendor */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the vendor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the compound */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the compound */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the compound was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the cell line */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the cell line */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the cell line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the species */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the species */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the species was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medium */,
  "medium_name" TEXT /* Name of the medium */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medium */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the medium */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the medium */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the medium was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the instrument */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the instrument */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the environment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
